title: Simply Boots
description: Dash, Scale, and Soar with Terraria-inspired Boots
body:
# Simply Boots

## Description
Simply Boots is a Fabric mod that adds Terraria-themed boots to the game. These boots each have unique abilities inspired by their Terraria counterparts. For example, the Hermes Boots let you run a bit faster, while the Rocket Boots let you boost up into the air. If you find multiple different boots, you may be able to combine their effects...

## Getting Started
To get started with this mod, look at the advancements, which detail where and how to find each type of boots!

## Mod Roadmap
- Update to more recent versions (1.18, 1.19, 1.20)
- Migrate to Architectury API for Forge and Quilt support
- Add particles and animations for boots
- Add more kinds of boots (Amphibian Boots, Dunerider Boots, etc.)
- Make boots renewable
- Add compatibility with Trinkets and Curios
- Add configuration
